title: El mesero
tmdbOverview: A waiter pretends to be an important businessman in order to reach the upper class through his entrepreneurial dreams.
synopsis: El mesero (2021) is a comedy film in Spanish. It has a 5.5 rating on IMDb. A standout of 2020s cinema, it earns its spot on our lists. It carries a B-15 certification (MX rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
